name: biff
description: Datetime arithmetic, parsing, formatting, timezone conversion, sequence generation, and log timestamp tagging for the command line.

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install biff: cargo install biff or download from GitHub releases (https://github.com/BurntSushi/biff/releases)

commands.description: Format timestamps, convert timezones, and round times

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install biff: cargo install biff or download from GitHub releases

args.name: -f
args.description: Output format: rfc3339, rfc9557, or strftime pattern (e.g. '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z')

args.name: timestamps
args.description: One or more timestamps to format (e.g. now, -1d, 'next sat', 'last monday')

commands.description: Add a duration to a timestamp

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install biff: cargo install biff or download from GitHub releases

args.name: duration
args.description: Duration to add (e.g. -1w, '1 week, 12 hours ago', 6mo)

commands.description: Calculate the duration since a given timestamp

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install biff: cargo install biff or download from GitHub releases

args.name: -l
args.description: Precision level: year, month, day, hour, minute, second

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install biff: cargo install biff or download from GitHub releases
